title: What integrity actually is (it's not what you do in public)
caption:
Integrity isn't being good where people can see you. It's being one man — the same in the pew, the weight room, and the empty apartment.

The hidden stuff rots you. The confessed stuff heals you. "Whoever conceals his sins does not prosper, but whoever confesses and renounces them finds mercy." (Proverbs 28:13)

Name the one thing you'd panic over if it went public. Start there. Be one man, everywhere.

ETHOS gives you one honest check-in a day — the daily rep that pulls your hidden life into the light.

#faith #integrity #discipline #christianmen #disciple
